imageAlt: Migrate custom css themes to new generator roadmap item preview image
title: Migrate custom css themes to new generator
summaryBody: We are migrating to a new PDF generator as the old one is no longer supported. Companies who use custom css themes will need to check their generated invoices and correct any issues as part of this migration.
detailBody: We are migrating to a new PDF generator as the old one is no longer supported. Companies who use custom css themes will need to check their generated invoices and correct any issues as part of this migration.
